pos_examples: Now, unbind configuration item frame_9 from release dress_red.
Once you are done, please apply qa check roof_11 to release dress_red using notification channel fire.
First, schedule deployment of release dress_red to environment rain with service component object_260 and configuration item frame_9 and then mark release dress_red as cleared from freeze.
The next step is to bind service component object_260 to release dress_red.
